changelog:
Fix: plugin no longer bundles native libSkiaSharp
- Exclude transitive SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.* packages pulled in by PDFtoImage
- Removes libSkiaSharp binaries that shadowed Jellyfin's own copy and caused a fatal 'native libSkiaSharp library (119.0) is incompatible' crash breaking all image processing
description: Automatically generates cover thumbnails for PDF files in your Jellyfin library by rendering the first page of each PDF. Supports configurable render resolution (DPI) and thumbnail padding mode.
name: PDF Thumbnails
overview: Generates thumbnail images from the first page of PDF files.
